# BrokerTrusted

> Independent reviews, rankings and comparisons of regulated forex brokers. We help traders identify the safest, most trusted brokers with transparent methodology covering regulation, spreads, execution and platforms.

## Core Pages

- [Home](/): Top trusted forex brokers of 2026 with rankings and quick comparisons.
- [About](/about): Our mission, editorial team and review methodology.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the BrokerTrusted team.
- [Blog](/blog): Original long-form forex guides, broker education, market analysis and trading costs.
- [How to Choose a Trusted Forex Broker in 2026](/blog/how-to-choose-a-trusted-forex-broker-2026): Evergreen guide covering broker regulation, safety of funds, costs, platforms, reputation and due diligence.
- [Forex Spreads and Real Trading Costs in 2026](/blog/forex-spreads-and-trading-costs-2026): Long-form guide on spreads, commissions, swaps, slippage and total round-turn cost per lot.
- [Forex Leverage: Complete Guide 2026](/blog/forex-leverage-complete-guide-2026): Guide on margin, leverage caps, position sizing and risk arithmetic.
- [Forex Technical Analysis 2026](/blog/forex-technical-analysis-indicators-patterns-2026): Guide covering indicators, chart patterns, price action and confluence.
- [Forex Risk Management 2026](/blog/forex-risk-management-protect-capital-2026): Guide on protecting capital, position sizing, portfolio heat and drawdown rules.
- [Best Forex Trading Platforms 2026](/blog/best-forex-trading-platforms-2026): In-depth comparison of MT4, MT5, cTrader and TradingView for forex.
- [Forex Trading Psychology 2026](/blog/forex-trading-psychology-2026): Guide on emotional control, cognitive biases, discipline and trader routine.
- [Forex vs Stocks: Which Is Better for Beginners in 2026](/blog/forex-vs-stocks-which-is-better-for-beginners-2026): Rigorous comparison of forex and stocks on costs, leverage, capital, hours and best fit.
- [How to Read Forex Charts — Beginner's Guide](/blog/how-to-read-forex-charts-beginners-guide): Step-by-step guide to candlesticks, timeframes, structure and building a chart-reading routine.

## Brokers

- [All Brokers](/brokers): Full list of the top 20 reviewed forex brokers.
- [Broker Reviews](/broker-reviews): In-depth professional reviews with pros and cons.
- [News Brokers](/news): Newly launched brokers founded after 2020.

## Categories & Rankings

- [Best Forex Brokers](/best-forex-brokers): Overall top-rated forex brokers.
- [Top Regulated Brokers](/top-regulated-brokers): Brokers with FCA, CySEC, ASIC licenses.
- [Best Spreads](/best-spreads): Lowest spread brokers for cost-sensitive traders.
- [Highest Leverage](/highest-leverage): Brokers offering the highest leverage.
- [Best Bonuses](/best-bonuses): Brokers with the best promotional bonuses.
- [New Brokers](/new-brokers): Recently launched brokers worth watching.
- [Best for Beginners](/best-for-beginners): Beginner-friendly brokers with demo accounts and low deposits.
- [Best for Professionals](/best-for-professionals): Institutional-grade brokers for advanced traders.
- [Best Mobile Apps](/best-mobile-apps): Brokers with top-rated mobile trading apps.
- [ECN Brokers](/ecn-brokers): Brokers using ECN execution model.
- [STP Brokers](/stp-brokers): Brokers using Straight Through Processing.
- [Market Makers](/market-makers): Market maker brokers explained and compared.

## Education

- [Trading Guides](/trading-guides): Structured learning paths for beginner and advanced traders.
- [Market Analysis](/market-analysis): Technical indicators, economic calendar and market sentiment.
- [Methodology](/methodology): Transparent criteria for regulation, safety, spreads, execution and platform testing.
- [Risk Warning](/risk-warning): CFD and forex risk disclosures for leveraged trading.
